{"query":"Longlegs 2024 movie Neon highest grossing domestic independent film record","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1667,"verdict":null,"extra_info":{"type":"featured_snippet","text":"Neon's horror movie “Longlegs,” directed by Osgood Perkins, has crossed the $100 million mark at the global box office to become the highest-grossing independent film release of the year."},"results":[{"url":"https://deadline.com/2024/07/longlegs-box-office-neon-record-1236023301/","title":"'Longlegs' Passing 'Parasite' As Neon's Highest-Grossing Movie Ever","content":"The Oz Perkins-directed and -written movie starring Maika Monroe grossed $1.3M on Thursday. taking its second week to $18.9M, and running total to $51.8M.
Neon pulled off this box office success with an avant garde P&A that cost under $10M, executed in cryptic clips leading up to a trailer.
Longlegs is the top-grossing R-rated horror film of 2024.
In its second week of release it became the highest-grossing indie horror film of the last 10 years, besting A24’s Talk to Me which tapped out at $48M after 91 days in the marketplace.
On Thursday night, as we previously told you, Deadpool & Wolverine clocked the best previews for an R-rated movie at $38.5M."},{"url":"https://variety.com/2024/film/box-office/longlegs-100-million-box-office-highest-grossing-indie-1236109098/","title":"Longlegs Becomes 2024's Highest-Grossing Indie With Over $100 Million","content":"Neon’s horror movie “Longlegs,” directed by Osgood Perkins, has crossed the $100 million mark at the global box office to become the highest-grossing independent film release of the year.

“Longlegs” was produced by Caplan of C2, Dan Kagan of Traffic, Kavanaugh-Jones from Range, Cage under his production company Saturn Films, and Ferguson of Oddfellows."},{"url":"https://screenrant.com/longlegs-box-office-highest-grossing-domestic-neon-movie/","title":"Nicolas Cage's New 2024 Horror Thriller Becomes Highest-Grossing Movie For Neon","content":"The Maika Monroe and Nicolas Cage-led Longlegs has reached a massive milestone for Neon.
The film follows an FBI agent, Lee Harker (Monroe), who is tasked with hunting down an occultist serial killer who has killed several families without being physically present for the crimes.
In the two weeks since its release, the film has grossed $51 million domestically and $60 million globally.
The Oz Perkins-written and -directed thriller starring Monroe and Cage is on track to beat the domestic box office gross of the Oscar-winning Parasite ($53.3 million), making it the highest domestically grossing film from Neon, according to Deadline.
Neon's Longlegs has earned its place in this year’s top horror films and might be one of the best."},{"url":"https://www.screendaily.com/news/nicolas-cage-horror-longlegs-scores-record-box-office-debut-for-neon-on-226m/5195455.article","title":"Nicolas Cage horror ‘Longlegs’ scores record box-office debut for Neon on $22.6m | News | Screen","content":"Nicolas Cage horror ‘Longlegs’ scores record box-office debut for Neon on $22.6m

Dave Caplan’s C2 Motion Picture Group financed Longlegs, which played on 2,510 screens and grossed $10m on Friday, $7.2m on Saturday, and $5.4m on Sunday.

The film stars Maika Monroe, Blair Underwood, Alicia Witt, and Nicolas Cage. *Longlegs* premiered in Los Angeles at the Grauman's Egyptian Theatre on July 8, 2024, and was released theatrically in the United States by Neon \"Neon (company)\") on July 12, 2024. It received positive reviews and grossed $128 million worldwide on a budget of less than $10 million, becoming Neon's highest-grossing film domestically, the highest-grossing independent film of the year, and Perkins's highest-grossing film.
